misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, a competitor known for his strategic play and thoughtful approach, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing the Kullo Golf Club with distinction. While he is yet to secure a title, his dedication to the sport remains unwavering.

Off the course, Ossi is known for his calm and collected demeanor, a stark contrast to the intensity he brings to the game. His peers often remark on his analytical mind, a trait that undoubtedly contributes to his meticulous course management.

One of the more curious aspects of Ossi's game is his infrequent use of the driver, a decision that has raised eyebrows and sparked discussions about his confidence. Despite the questions, Ossi remains steadfast in his approach, trusting his accuracy and precision to navigate the course. This will be his fourth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026.
